message:
The other night, my family and I decided to have a little fun with some old-school board games instead of our usual screens. It was a blast! As we were laughing and rolling dice, I couldn’t help but think about how important it is to keep our home safe, especially with all the kitchen chaos that can happen during dinner prep. 

Afterward, we took a moment to review our escape plan in case of a fire. It was surprisingly easy to weave it into our game night chat, and it felt good to be prepared without all the seriousness. Sometimes, a little bit of low-tech fun can lead to really important conversations! 

Have you had any fun family moments that turned into a chance to talk about safety?
